anomalies.scope: listed four-dimensional perturbative anomalies, realized as exact operator traces on the matter module

witten_parity.scope: finite Witten-parity surrogate: the mod-2 count of realized weak doublets

auxiliary_car_fock.fermionic_parity: (-1)^N, derived from the CAR grading; currents are parity even, creations parity odd
auxiliary_car_fock.koszul_braiding: creation operators anticommute exactly (CAR), giving the super braiding and the wedge Leibniz rule

branch_scope.declared_source_data: the trace-balanced exterior matter contract (block trace charges, the one-scalar choice, the Yukawa channel list), the fermionic statistics contract, the Spin/odd-Weyl category typing, the kernel emission contract, and the MAR class declaration
branch_scope.not_claimed: no derivation of trace balance from source dynamics (BLOCK-DETERMINANT-BALANCE open), no global-form choice (AXIS-CENTER-DESCENT open), no family attachment, no MAR uniqueness, no scalar potential, no pole mass, no continuum spin-statistics theorem, no identification with physical particle content
branch_scope.upstream_packets: the certified #565 carrier and the #566 physical current algebra, both hash-pinned

category.conjugation: wedge pairing into the invariant top line
category.nonempty: the odd matter object is nonzero (fifteen states) with a faithful current action
category.objects: subquotients of tensor powers of V and its dual, realized on the auxiliary CAR/Fock space
category.spin: source-derived PORT-SPIN-LIFT with non-split double cover
category.tensor: wedge product with Koszul braiding; the CAR-derivation identity is the exact Leibniz rule

chirality.argument: any intertwiner S with the dual module satisfies S dGamma(Y) = -dGamma(Y)^T S, so S maps each charge eigenspace into the negated eigenvalue; the exact spectra are disjoint, hence S = 0

claim_boundary.closes: SUPER-TANNAKIAN-MATTER-LIFT on the declared echosahedral response branch, including the PORT-SPIN-LIFT construction on that branch
claim_boundary.declared_source_data: the trace-balanced exterior matter contract, statistics and category typing, kernel emission contract, and MAR class declaration enter as declared source data with the same epistemic status as the pinned carrier and response manifests
does_not_close: BLOCK-DETERMINANT-BALANCE (physical selection of the trace-balanced charge pair)
AXIS-CENTER-DESCENT and the global form (the kernel is emitted, the quotient is not chosen)
MAR uniqueness (only nonemptiness is discharged here)
A5-FAMILY-ATTACHMENT, family structure, and any three-family claim
exclusion of other anomaly-free light sectors (MGFC-grade no-extra-sector)
scalar potential, pole masses, measured couplings, continuum spin-statistics, or quantum field theory

conjugation.pairing: wedge into the top line Lambda^5 V, which is exactly invariant by trace balance
conjugation.statement: the parity-complement selection realizes the conjugate module inside the same Fock space

downstream: AXIS-CENTER-DESCENT consumes the emitted action kernel; a5_screen_sm_closure.py and exterior_sm_completion.py reference this closure in their gate ledgers
dependency_acyclicity_note.summary: carrier packet -> current packet -> matter lift receipt -> ledger references; the graph is acyclic

derivation_chain.conclusion: the source packet is admissible: trace-balanced exterior contract, fermionic statistics, spin typing, kernel emission, MAR declaration
the physical current algebra u(3) (+) so(3) with its charged response space is strictly upstream
uses: gate check on the stored receipt

derivation_chain.conclusion: the twelve current generators, sixty rotations, and exact structure constants are rebuilt from source
PORT-SPIN-LIFT: a non-split SU(2) double cover (binary icosahedral) with irrational spinor characters
a faithful skew-adjoint Lie algebra homomorphism onto the matter carrier V = C (+) W
derivation_chain.premise: source even block, spin lift, declared trace-balanced charges

derivation_chain.conclusion: the 32-state auxiliary Fock space with source-derived fermionic parity and Koszul super structure
derivation_chain.premise: the auxiliary CAR algebra over V

derivation_chain.conclusion: the current algebra acts on the auxiliary Fock space by parity-even super derivations
derivation_chain.premise: second quantization of the matter transport

derivation_chain.conclusion: the derived invariant sector is exactly the vacuum and top lines; the top line is invariant by trace balance
derivation_chain.premise: the joint kernel of the twelve second-quantized currents

derivation_chain.conclusion: the source-derived equivariant projector selects the fifteen-state matter module from the full auxiliary Fock space
derivation_chain.premise: parity projector minus the derived invariant line

derivation_chain.conclusion: the exterior package is realized with fields Q, u_c, e_c, d_c, L and derived integrality normalization six
uses: five irreducible blocks with scalar commutants

derivation_chain.conclusion: the listed perturbative anomalies vanish exactly and the Witten parity is even (four weak doublets)
derivation_chain.premise: realized operator traces on the matter module

derivation_chain.conclusion: the matter module is exactly chiral and its conjugate is realized in the opposite parity sector
derivation_chain.premise: disjoint charge spectra and the wedge pairing

derivation_chain.conclusion: the physical invariant sector is nonzero: exactly one invariant line per declared channel
derivation_chain.premise: declared Yukawa channels on realized blocks

derivation_chain.conclusion: the common action kernel (order six, generator (zeta_6, omega, -1)) is emitted as data; the global quotient is not formed
derivation_chain.premise: realized weights with triality and duality

derivation_chain.conclusion: the matter lift descends naturally along the declared refinement tower
the matter-lift gate passes on the reference packet and fails closed on every countermodel

factor_origins.charges_1/6_-2/3_1_1/3_-1/2: additive weights of the declared (y_C, y_W) = (-1/3, 1/2) on the realized exterior blocks
factor_origins.dimensions_32_16_15: 2^5 auxiliary Fock states; the even parity sector; even minus the derived vacuum line
factor_origins.kernel_order_6: exact count of (u1 phase, su3 center, su2 center) triples acting trivially on every realized weight
factor_origins.normalization_6: least common multiple of the realized charge denominators
factor_origins.order_120_unique_involution: the exact SU(2) lift set of the sixty proper rotations with its single order-two element -1
factor_origins.order_profile_1_1_20_30_24_20_24: exact element orders of the binary icosahedral lift group (orders 1,2,3,4,5,6,10)
factor_origins.weak_doublets_4: half the number of matter states with nonzero su(2) Casimir diagonal
factor_origins.yukawa_lines_3: exact joint-invariant dimensions of the three declared channels

issue_closure_condition.optional_strengthening: deriving the trace-balanced charge pair from source dynamics would close BLOCK-DETERMINANT-BALANCE; the issue's acceptance criteria do not require it
issue_closure_condition.produced_locally: the exact super-Tannakian matter lift: non-split PORT-SPIN-LIFT, faithful current action, source-derived equivariant selection of the fifteen-state module, realized anomaly and Witten checks, chirality, conjugation, Yukawa invariant lines, emitted order-six action kernel, and refinement descent
issue_closure_condition.source_data: the hash-pinned #565/#566 packets plus the declared matter-lift contracts (trace-balanced block charges, one scalar, channel list, statistics, category typing, kernel emission, MAR class)

kernel_emission.cover: R x SU(3) x SU(2), the simply connected cover of the derived current group data
kernel_emission.downstream_consumer: AXIS-CENTER-DESCENT (global-form descent); the quotient is not formed here
kernel_emission.tensor_additivity: charge, triality, and duality are additive over wedge and tensor factors by construction, so triviality on the verified weight list extends to every realized matter tensor
kernel_emission.verified_trivial_on: every realized matter state, every carrier mode, and the declared scalar

mar_class.note: this packet discharges the nonemptiness precondition; MAR uniqueness stays in its own lane
mar_class.witness: the realized packet: fifteen multiplicity-free states (one generation), one declared scalar, exact chirality, vanishing realized anomaly traces

matter_carrier.carrier: V = C (+) W = (even response sector C^3) (+) (spin-lifted weak doublet C^2)
matter_carrier.central_charge_provenance: the trace-balanced redistribution of the central charge onto (y_C, y_W) is the declared conditional exterior matter contract; BLOCK-DETERMINANT-BALANCE (the physical selection of trace balance) is not closed here
matter_carrier.raw_source_central_charge: i on the even response sector, 0 on the kernel sector (from the #566 packet)
matter_carrier.trace_balance: 3 y_C + 2 y_W = 0, checked exactly; the top line is exactly invariant because of it

port_spin_lift.conclusion: the sixty proper implementers lift to SU(2) with a unique involution -1 in the 120-element lift group, so the double cover is non-split (binary icosahedral) and PORT-SPIN-LIFT is realized on this branch; irrational spinor characters exclude any signed register-relabeling realization of the spinor sector

selection.derived_invariant_sector: complex dimension 2: the Fock vacuum and the top line
selection.projector: parity projector minus the derived invariant line, diagonal in the subset basis, exact rank 15
selection.realization: operator projector on the auxiliary CAR/Fock space, not representation arithmetic

uses_only: declared fermionic statistics and Spin/odd-Weyl category contracts
declared kernel emission contract and MAR class declaration

yukawa_sector.statement: the physical invariant sector is nonzero: one exact invariant line per declared channel
